1y_messages.description: Number of VAAs emitted in the last 1 year (includes Pyth messages).

1y_volume.description: Volume transferred through the token bridge in the last 1 year, in USD.

24h_messages.description: Number of VAAs emitted in the last 24 hours (includes Pyth messages).

24h_volume.description: Volume transferred through the token bridge in the last 24 hours, in USD.

30d_messages.description: Number of VAAs emitted in the last 30 days (includes Pyth messages).

30d_volume.description: Volume transferred through the token bridge in the last 30 days, in USD.

7d_messages.description: Number of VAAs emitted in the last 7 days (includes Pyth messages).

7d_volume.description: Volume transferred through the token bridge in the last 7 days, in USD.

90d_messages.description: Number of VAAs emitted in the last 90 days (includes Pyth messages).

90d_volume.description: Volume transferred through the token bridge in the last 90 days, in USD.

total_messages.description: Number of VAAs emitted since the creation of the network (includes Pyth messages).

total_tx_count.description: Number of VAAs emitted since the creation of the network (does not include Pyth messages)
